title: TrueClearGlass
description: makes all glass fully transparent other then the borders
body:
TrueClearGlass Crystal Clear Glass for Minecraft

Say goodbye to streaks,and foggy blocks!
TrueClearGlass is a clean and minimal Minecraft texture pack that replaces default glass textures with completely clear,and seamless glass perfect for modern builds, redstone contraptions, greenhouses, or any project where you need true visual clarity.

Includes:
Transparent glass blocks and panes
Compatible with most shaders
Works in all dimensions (Overworld, Nether, End)

 Why TrueClearGlass?
Unlike other “clear glass” packs, TrueClearGlass is designed to be lightweight, lag-free, and truly invisible where it counts — no outlines, no tint, just pure visibility.
